transcript.text:
You have to eat briquette-grilled beef when you're here in Taebaek
[On briquette grill]
[Behold...]
[Taebaek Beef]
[Korean BBQ at Taebaek]
[Over 12 servings of food]
[I wonder if she can eat it all...]
Just give me everything you have
[What?!]
[Forreal?]
[Taebaek Beef grilled on briquette]
[Serving right up]
[More..]
[Bigger]
[Even bigger piece]
[As a whole]

[Wow]
Is your stomach okay?
[Really?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Taebaek, Gangwon-do today
This city is known for their briquette-grilled beef
I can already spot a few of them on this street alone
But first, I'm here at a butcher shop
that's been holding down 40 years of tradition
Here it is
[Hyundai Silbi] [Taebaek, Hwangji-dong]
Hello~
[Wow]
That's huge
Take a look at this
[The size of those ribs]

What kind of meat is this?
We're working on the ribs right now
It's cut up right into the customers' tables
I want to eat the whole thing
I'm getting nervous
So excited What do I order?
I want to eat everything
Chuck flap tail, outside skirt, beef ribs,
Thank you
This is eco-friendly
300g of sirloin,
300g of skirt steak,
300g of beef ribs,
300g of short ribs,
300g of chuck flap tail,
[What...]

[How much is that?]
300g of top sirloin,
Just give me everything
[Sales are through the roof today]
[Fresh beef that represents Taebaek]
[A little bit of every meat]
[Outside skirt]
[Short ribs]
[Chuck flap tail]
This is the regular beef ribs
[Sirloin, Top sirloin, Skirt steak, and Beef ribs] Thank you
This is the marinated beef
Chuck flap tail and Outside skirt
Eat the non-seasoned beef first

Top sirloin first

Briquette grill
It's going to be great
Skirt steak
I don't think I had briquette-grilled beef before
Cooks rather quickly
It's good on regular fire, I wonder how delicious it'll be grilled with briquette
I need to hurry and eat I don't want to over-cook it
I should cook a little bit at a time It cooks really quickly
Well-cooked top sirloin
With a little bit of salt
That smokey flavor
Love the scent
The texture is great too
Skirt steak
The scent is really great
So juicy

The meat itself is really savory
It's not too greasy either
Great scent
Tender and tasty
The texture is gelatinous
Very juicy with every bite
Should I try 1 of each?
Let's cook ribs and sirloin
Wow, sirloin
Sirloin is love
I love how quickly they cook
Really fast
I'll eat this right away
I've been wanting to eat sirloin as a whole
Grab it as a whole
Tender... Can you see the glossiness?

Every part has its own flavor!
Sirloin is very delicious
So juicy
Top sirloin had more chewiness and texture
These are really soft
Tender beef ribs
The meat that's close to the ribs have the best scent
It's top quality

Put the ribs,

Garlic too
Spiced scallions,

That's so good

Let's try these too

Chuck flap tail?

Yes it is

Outside skirt meat
Of course,
Wow

Chuck flap tail #2, Sirloin #3,

Skirt meat #6, Top sirloin #7
Seems like you're eating that by yourself
We're full after 1 plate

-Are you eating it all? -Of course
[The owner is having doubts]
Server: It's mukbang for a reason
Will she really eat it all?

[Of course]
I never knew that Taebaek was known for their beef
Why is it famous?
Taebaek has always been known for their beef?
Yes, Taebaek is known for the bulls
It tastes different
For female cows... For younger...
There's a cattle...
Uhm...
[New player has entered]
Not greasy, full of flavor, and delicious
[Do you want to see it?]
[Humongous]
This consists of beef ribs and short ribs
Looks yummy
Thank you

[Promoters exit]
You take it, I can't do it
I have to save the best for last
[Finished grilling]
Wrap it up like this

With spiced scallions
Let's cook the skirt steak~

Chuck flap tail

Wow, thank you
Beef roll

That texture

All meat juice

Soft

Thank you

Really flavorful

No wonder
Lovely
Our meat gets sent out all over the country
Really?!

Yummy
Perilla leaf

My favorite meat It's an outside skirt mountain

This looks fantastic

[A perfect finish with sweetness and saltiness]
Tasty Their seasoning is all delicious
Especially the rib sauce
Sweet,
And it goes well with the meat
It disappeared within a minute
I don't usually eat rice with KBBQ, but this calls for a bowl of rice

You doubted her at first

Doubted with certainty
[Let's finish it up]
That just melts!
[Perfect meat for a lettuce wrap]
[5 bottles of soda...?]
Finished

All done
Is your stomach okay?
I'm fine
It won't explode
Did she eat a party portion by herself?
[What...?]
[What in the world...]
I really enjoyed Taebaek's briquette KBBQ
I'm going to do a Taebaek tour now
[What is this place located in the middle of the mountains?]
This is Tongri Tan-tan Park located in Taebaek
It's a new tourist attraction
They filmed the K-drama "Descendants of the Sun" here
Look at that
The collapsed building is also a movie set
That's amazing

Tunnel
Seems like a tunnel
[And if we enter the tunnel...]
[Tunnel of lights]
[Mysterious tunnel of media art]
[Let's go in deeper]
Wow
[A dazzling path of lights unfold]
There are so many cool things here
[After passing through the tunnel of lights...]
[Across the galaxy]
[Unce unce]
[After the tunnel of music...]
Exit!
There's another attraction here
It's called the Aurora Park

I'm taking the tour taxi
Go go
[Click it or ticket]
Let's go~!
[Enjoying the views of Taebaek from a tour taxi]
What's the difference between a tour taxi and a regular taxi?
We used to have a city tour bus
But those discontinued because of the pandemic
Tour taxi is able to provide the service with affordable costs
[The place we arrived with the tour taxi]
Ta-da This is Taebaek's Aurora Park
This is the famous tower
Called "Snowflake Observatory"
[How will the view be up there?]
We're really high up
Check out all the mountains

That's so scary!
This reminds me of Squid Game
[We're all going to die...]
They have a 5-day market opened here So I'll check it out
[Taebaek Tongri Market]
Pastries!
[Taebaek Tongri 5-Day Market full with great snacks]
Wow, fishcake skewers
That's huge Amazing
I have to have some
You must be a model
[Life's not fair] No wonder you're skinny
Fishcake skewers at the market are the best
I came to Taebaek today to eat their beef and visit tourist attractions
I had so much fun
You guys should also give Taebaek a visit once you get a chance
